<!--
  Thanks for contributing to Lonca! Please run through this checklist before submitting.
-->

## Summary

<!-- Describe the change briefly. What problem does it solve? Which package does it affect? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / chore
- [ ] New marketplace SDK

## Changeset

- [ ] I ran `pnpm changeset` and documented the change (not required for chore / docs)

## Tests

- [ ] I added or updated tests for new / changed code
- [ ] `pnpm test`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint` all pass locally

## Related issue

Closes #
